name: Azemoir caesar
description: Advanced blockchain intelligence agent focused on predictive modeling for early-stage tokens. Azemoir Caesar scans smart contracts, developer activity, and wallet distribution patterns to calculate the probability of massive price appreciation. Whether it's micro-cap breakouts or hidden ecosystem plays, Caesar delivers real-time insights for high-risk, high-reward trading strategies.
